prestazioni: M240i N55B30M0 engine swap with a Pure Stage 2 turbo upgrade (Garrett GTX3582R Gen II, 1.08 A/R turbine housing, 0.82 A/R compressor housing) paired with a VRSF 7" intercooler and a custom 3.5" charge pipe system with Tial Q 50mm blow-off valve

Full bolt-on fueling solution: Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, and a Motiv Motorsport port injection kit with dual Bosch 0280158109 injectors for E85 compatibility up to E60 blend

Custom MHD Stage 2+ flash with a 22psi peak boost target, aggressive timing maps optimized for 93 octane (or E30 blend), and a custom back-end flash for the ZF 8HP50Z transmission with 0.05s faster shift times and 2,800rpm flat-shift capability
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (F22-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front canards, and a duckbill rear spoiler, all finished in BMW Individual Frozen Grey metallic paint
OEM+ M Performance carbon fiber kidney grilles, mirror caps, and rear diffuser with a custom 3M Gloss Black wrap on the roof and pillars for contrast

BC Racing BR Type ER coilovers with Swift Springs (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear) and Ohlins R&T front camber plates, paired with MCS 2-way adjustable dampers and a custom subframe reinforcement kit from 034Motorsport
